title: SiTime Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights - Record Growth and AI Momentum
text: SiTime's Q3 2024 earnings call highlighted record growth across all segments with 62% year-over-year revenue growth to $57.7 million. The company achieved a net income of $9.6 million (17% of revenue) and EPS of $0.40 per share, significantly beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.26 per share. Management discussed the strategic positioning in the AI data center market, with new timing solutions specifically designed for AI infrastructure. The company emphasized the importance of precision timing in AI systems and the opportunity to expand content with existing customers. Strategic initiatives included the pending Renesas timing business acquisition, expected to close with $300 million revenue run rate and 70% gross margins.
